ddls:
CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the venue is located */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the venue is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the venue */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., park, food and drink shop, restaurant) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the venue */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the venue */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue (e.g., number of seats for restaurants) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the venue */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the venue */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the venue information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_neighborhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_borough FOREIGN KEY ("borough") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_venue_type FOREIGN KEY ("venue_type") REFERENCES venue_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the borough information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Borough where the neighborhood is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the neighborhood information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the category information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_label" INTEGER /* Label assigned to the cluster */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Neighborhood where the cluster is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cluster */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the cluster information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue being ranked */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster where the venue is ranked */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the venue within the cluster */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the ranking information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_rankings_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_rankings_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)
column_names: Borough where the venue is located
